title: Maximum Sum Obtained of Any Permutation

testcases.input: nums = [1,2,3,4,5], requests = [[1,3],[0,1]] Output: 19 Explanation: One permutation of nums is [2,1,3,4,5] with the following result: requests[0] -> nums[1] + nums[2] + nums[3] = 1 + 3 + 4 = 8 requests[1] -> nums[0] + nums[1] = 2 + 1 = 3 Total sum: 8 + 3 = 11. A permutation with a higher total sum is [3,5,4,2,1] with the following result: requests[0] -> nums[1] + nums[2] + nums[3] = 5 + 4 + 2 = 11 requests[1] -> nums[0] + nums[1] = 3 + 5 = 8 Total sum: 11 + 8 = 19, which is the best that you can do.
testcases.expectedOutput: 19 Explanation: One permutation of nums is [2,1,3,4,5] with the following result: requests[0] -> nums[1] + nums[2] + nums[3] = 1 + 3 + 4 = 8 requests[1] -> nums[0] + nums[1] = 2 + 1 = 3 Total sum: 8 + 3 = 11. A permutation with a higher total sum is [3,5,4,2,1] with the following result: requests[0] -> nums[1] + nums[2] + nums[3] = 5 + 4 + 2 = 11 requests[1] -> nums[0] + nums[1] = 3 + 5 = 8 Total sum: 11 + 8 = 19, which is the best that you can do.

testcases.input: nums = [1,2,3,4,5,6], requests = [[0,1]] Output: 11 Explanation: A permutation with the max total sum is [6,5,4,3,2,1] with request sums [11].
testcases.expectedOutput: 11 Explanation: A permutation with the max total sum is [6,5,4,3,2,1] with request sums [11].

testcases.input: nums = [1,2,3,4,5,10], requests = [[0,2],[1,3],[1,1]] Output: 47 Explanation: A permutation with the max total sum is [4,10,5,3,2,1] with request sums [19,18,10].
testcases.expectedOutput: 47 Explanation: A permutation with the max total sum is [4,10,5,3,2,1] with request sums [19,18,10].
